title: Shopping Online
content: I often shop online because it is convenient and saves time. Last week, I needed a new backpack for work. Instead of visiting several stores, I compared products on different websites. I read customer reviews, checked prices, and looked at photos. After finding a good option, I placed the order and received a confirmation email. The backpack arrived three days later and matched the description perfectly. Online shopping gives people access to many products and makes it easy to compare options before buying.
